name: Detective Holmes: Trap for the Hunter. Hidden objects. 探し物
short_description: New adventures of famous detective Holmes are waiting for you! Investigate with Holmes in England and India to reveal the mysterious crime. Attractive locations, intriguing mini-games and hidden object puzzles will not let you be bored.
detailed_description:
🕵️‍♂️ ABOUT THE GAME

New adventures of the legendary detective Holmes await you!
A priceless artifact has been stolen from Lord Crowley’s private collection, and all clues lead to distant India. If you enjoy detective stories, thrilling investigations, and hidden object gameplay, this mystery is yours to solve.

🚨 SCANDALOUS ROBBERY IN LONDON

The city is in shock after a bold theft strikes at the heart of high society. Join Holmes as he takes on one of his most challenging cases yet. Use your skills to search for clues, investigate suspects, and piece together the truth. Every detail counts.

🌍 A JOURNEY ACROSS CONTINENTS

Travel from the foggy streets of London to the ancient temples of India. Uncover secrets hidden for centuries as you explore beautiful, atmospheric locations. Along the way, solve puzzles, play mini-games, and dive into richly detailed hidden object scenes that will keep you engaged from start to finish.

🔎 FEATURES

  • Realistic scenes featuring iconic detective characters

  • Varied gameplay: hidden objects, spot-the-difference, puzzles, and mini-games

  • Many objects are authentic antiques

  • Innovative photo hint system to assist your investigation

  • Engaging story that blends classic mystery with exotic adventure

Only the sharpest minds will solve this case!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Japanese, Korean, Russian, Simplified Chinese
